description: Structures ICMM Critical Control Management for a material unwanted event in a mine — identifies the critical controls, sets performance requirements, verification activities + frequencies, and accountabilities, and frames the bowtie via the shared bowtie-builder facilitator (referenced, not re-authored). It authors the mining CCM overlay (criticality, the principal-hazard taxonomy) itself. Use it to set up critical-control management for a mining principal hazard or structure a CCM workshop. Assistive: it structures the workshop and never an autonomous artifact — a competent mine team owns the engineering judgement and the live verification.
name: icmm-critical-control-management
